summary: UI-only home renders the seller dashboard with demo shop data, skips shops API, and splits authenticated routing to reduce cold-compile graph; lucide import optimization in next.config.js.

interfaceChanges.description: Optional uiOnly prop uses demo shop and skips api.shops.list
Auth-guarded home route extracted from page.tsx for code splitting

mappings.criterion: UI-only renders dashboard immediately without shops API (#71, #70)
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_ui_only_home.test.tsx::renders dashboard modules immediately without calling shops API

mappings.criterion: UI-only shows demo shop name in header (#71)

recommendations: Manually verify cold first compile with rm -rf .next/cache && NEXT_PUBLIC_UI_ONLY=1 npm run dev.
